data.title: Implement ticket-archive-markers-backfill.sh
data.description: Create plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-archive-markers-backfill.sh. Script scans all ticket dirs in TRACKER_DIR, calls python3 inline to check if any event file has event_type==ARCHIVED. If yes and .archived marker does not already exist, calls write_marker() from ticket_reducer.marker. Reports count: 'Wrote N markers, skipped M (already present)'. Must be idempotent. Follow ticket-compact-all.sh pattern for discovery + processing. Add executable bit (chmod +x). testing_mode: GREEN (T9 covers behavior).
